title: Library
text: Library Specifies the library containing the global objects used by the component or application shell. If no library is specified, the library defined for the application shell is used. Otherwise, SYSTEM_LIBRARY is used as the default. Expected Value: String of up to 32 characters. Supports Unicode. Default Value: None Applies To Components Application Shells for Desktop Applications Application Shells for Servers Related Links Libraries Libraries are collections of objects that can be shared in some way, either during development, or at runtime. They are main development objects, so whenever they are saved or exported, all the objects that they contain are included. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
